'''Harry Robertson''' (born 21 December 2005) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|ce}} for [[St Helens RLFC|St Helens]] in the [[Super League]].

==Background==
Robertson was signed into the St Helens system after he impressed at the amateur side, Halton Farnworth Hornets.

==Club career==
===St Helens===
Robertson made his club debut for St Helens in round 17 of the [[2024 Super League season]] against arch-rivals [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]]. On 7 February 2025, Robertson signed a four-year contract extension to remain at St Helens until the end of 2028.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cwyp2zg7l50o|title=Saints teenager Robertson signs deal until 2028|website=www.bbc.co.uk}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.saintsrlfc.com/teams/first-team/harry-robertson/|title=‘Robbo’ is one of the brightest young stars in all rugby league|website=www.saintsrlfc.com}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.sthelensstar.co.uk/sport/25299029.harry-robertson-first-12-months-st-helens-first-team/|title=Harry Robertson on first 12 months in St Helens' first team|website=www.sthelensstar.co.uk}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.totalrl.com/teen-star-harry-robertson-on-his-whirlwind-rise-and-st-helens-struggles/|title=Teen star Harry Robertson on his ‘whirlwind’ rise and St Helens’ struggles|website=www.totalrl.com}}</ref>
Robertson played 25 games for St Helens in the 2025 Super League season as the club came within one game of the grand final but lost the semi-final against [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] 20-12. On 7 October 2025, Robertson was voted as the Super League's young player of the season.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/ce86r25lrxno/|title=Saints snatch stunning play-off victory at Leeds|website=www.bbc.co.uk|accessdate=7 October 2025}}</ref>
